articles.title: Celebrated British artist David Hockney dies aged 88
articles.description: Hockney, one of the UK's most important and influential artists, has died at the age of 88.

articles.title: Art's great innovator whose vivid paintings made him a household name
articles.description: The proud Yorkshireman, who also painted iconic pictures of America, was routinely described as Britain's greatest artist.
